stories.title: Follow live: Mbappé, Dembélé goals keep France in ...
Clips-Raptors trade for Kawhi on hold amid probe
stories.summary: The Clippers-Raptors trade involving Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA probe into whether the Clippers circumvented the salary cap is completed.

stories.title: Steph acknowledges 'allure' of playing with LeBron...
stories.summary: Stephen Curry acknowledged the appeal of a late-career Hall of Fame team up with his long-time NBA rival LeBron James.

stories.title: Top '27 recruit Spears Jr. reclassifies, picks Tex...
stories.summary: Marcus Spears Jr., the No. 1 prospect in the class of 2027, is reclassifying and committing to Texas for the upcoming college basketball season, he told ESPN on Thursday.

stories.title: Study: NFLers die from dementia at higher rate
stories.summary: NFL players are four times more likely than the general population to die of neurodegenerative diseases such as dementia and Parkinson's, according to a study released Wednesday.
